title: Cellulophaga growth reading
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5c71f","text":"For One-step growth curves for Cellulophaga phages protocol and Transcriptomics During One-Step Growth Curves for Cellulophaga Phages protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":4,"length":46},{"key":1,"offset":64,"length":69}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"A74BE2BD271B4A439FFD76FEAF69B674","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/One-step-growth-curves-for-Cellulophaga-phages-ddh235"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"E7EA7C279093418091D81C15072C2191","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Transcriptomics-During-One-Step-Growth-Curves-for-dem3c5"}}}}
steps: Pipet 200 μl of MLB media into wells A1 and A2 of a white microtiter plate This is your ‘blank’.

Pipet 200 μl of sample (the new culture you just inoculated) into wells B1 and B2 of the same plate Ensure that there are no bubbles in the wells, as they will affect your readings. Pipet away any bubbles.
Read the plate on the plate reader
